issue: Title tag is too generic ('Sample Page') - lacks keywords, brand name, and descriptive content
recommendation: Use a descriptive title (50-60 chars) with primary keywords, e.g. 'Product Name - Primary Keyword | Brand Name'
Add <meta name="description" content="..."> with a compelling 150-160 character summary including target keywords

issue: No structured data (JSON-LD / Schema.org) found on the page
recommendation: Add JSON-LD structured data (e.g. WebPage, Organization, or relevant schema type) to improve rich snippet eligibility

issue: Missing robots meta tag - search engine crawl/index directives are not explicitly set
recommendation: Add <meta name="robots" content="index, follow"> to explicitly declare indexing intent

issue: Missing canonical URL tag - risk of duplicate content issues
recommendation: Add <link rel="canonical" href="https://example.com/"> to indicate the preferred URL

issue: Missing Open Graph meta tags (og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url) - poor social sharing appearance
recommendation: Add og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url, og:type meta tags for social media optimization

issue: Missing Twitter Card meta tags (twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description)
recommendation: Add twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image meta tags

issue: lang attribute is 'en' which is correct but could be more specific (e.g. en-US)
recommendation: Consider using a more specific locale like 'en-US' or 'en-GB' if targeting a specific region

issue: No Organization or WebSite structured data - missing brand identity signals for search engines
recommendation: Add Organization schema with name, url, logo, and sameAs (social profiles)

issue: No BreadcrumbList structured data - breadcrumbs won't appear in search results
recommendation: Add BreadcrumbList JSON-LD if the site has hierarchical navigation

issue: charset is declared correctly as UTF-8 - no issue
Viewport meta tag is present and correctly configured - no issue
Missing favicon declaration - affects brand recognition in browser tabs and search results
recommendation: Add <link rel="icon" href="/favicon.ico"> and consider apple-touch-icon as well

issue: Image at /public/logo.png is missing alt attribute - hurts image SEO and accessibility
recommendation: Add descriptive alt text to all images, especially brand-related ones like logos

issue: Render-blocking external stylesheet in <head> can delay First Contentful Paint
recommendation: Consider using media queries, preload, or critical CSS inlining to reduce render-blocking

issue: @font-face missing font-display: swap - may cause invisible text during font load (FOIT)
recommendation: Add font-display: swap to @font-face declarations for better perceived performance
